title: BEM-805 execute 804 route
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:32 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
def files(g): return [str(p) for p in sorted(Path('.').glob(g)) if p.is_file()]
route=load('governance/state/bem804_route_after_marker_execution.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
results=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/*.status.json')
queue=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/*.json')
if rs=='route_parse_dispatch_results' or results:
    status='parse_dispatch_results_ready'; next_action='parse dispatch result JSON and patch exact failure'
elif rs=='route_patch_shell_loop_no_results':
    status='patch_shell_loop_needed'; next_action='patch shell loop result file creation and commit path'
elif rs=='route_create_new_queue_item':
    status='create_queue_item_needed'; next_action='create fresh Claude dispatch queue item then tick'
elif rs=='route_reposition_runner_step':
    status='reposition_runner_step_needed'; next_action='reposition processor inside codex-runner job and verify lint'
else:
    status='diagnose_again_needed'; next_action='inspect route state, queue, marker and runner placement again'
state={'bem':'BEM-805','status':status,'route_status':rs,'results':results[-10:],'queue':queue[-10:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem805_execute_bem804_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem805_execute_bem804_route.md').write_text('# BEM-805 | Execute BEM-804 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem805_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-805'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem805_execute_bem804_route.json','governance/reports/bem805_execute_bem804_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem805_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Executed route after BEM-804 by checking dispatch results and queue state')
"""
